case_number: Crl. AT Acq. Appeal No.152 of 2022

chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. Crl. AT Acq. Appeal No.152 of 2022 Present: Mr. Justice Omar Sial Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi Appellant: The State through Mr. Muhammad Khalid Javed Rana, Deputy Attorney General & Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General Respondents: Umra Khan, Bacha Khan and Akbar Khan through Mr. Mamoon A.K Shirwany, advocate Date of hearing: 16.04.2026 Date of order: 28.04.2026 ORDER Omar Sial, J. The learned DAG has been unable to point out any mis-reading or non-reading of evidence in the impugned judgment. Neither has any jurisdictional issue been argued. We also fail to understand as to under what authority did Inspector Ghulam Abbas file this appeal. The appeal is also barred by limitation and no cogent reason has been provided for the delayed filing. The appeal, yet to be admitted, is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
